mapper.select:
select o.*, l.station_list, s.plate_number, s.vehicle_type, (SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'stationId', s.station_id, 'stationName', s.station_name ) ) FROM station s WHERE FIND_IN_SET(s.station_id, REPLACE(REPLACE(l.station_list, '[', ''), ']', '')) ) AS station_info FROM wx_order o LEFT JOIN bus_schedule s ON o.schedule_id = s.schedule_id LEFT JOIN line l ON s.line_id = l.line_id
and order_no like concat('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
and order_status = #{query.orderStatus}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
